review_title: If you are a Notion user... this is just amazing
description: I managed to create and distribute numerous single-page websites in just minutes, integrating them into a marketing campaign. This process was incredibly time-efficient and required minimal effort, especially when compared to other alternatives.
author: Julian J.
pros: Creating a landing page or website is as simple as crafting a Notion page. The Notion website builder empowers you to seamlessly turn your ideas into a digital presence with remarkable ease.
cons: I've encountered some challenges with my Notion page, especially when it involves databases or data from other Notion pages that aren't set to public. I'm confident there's a straightforward solution, but it's been somewhat tricky for me to figure out.

review_title: Powerful tool for creating websites directly from Notion pages
author: Saket J.
pros: It stands out for its ease of use, allowing me to convert their Notion content into fully functional websites without any coding knowledge. Immediately reflected online offering a seamless content management experience. It's particularly beneficial for individuals or businesses looking to establish an online presence quickly and efficiently, leveraging Notion's organizational capabilities. This builder is ideal for those who already use Notion for documentation or project management and wish to extend their use case to web development.
cons: Limited customisation options compared to traditional web development platforms Reliance on Notion's uptime and performance Advanced SEO features and integrations with third-party services may be more challenging to implement Learning curve for new users.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great idea but buggy and support is really weak
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I needed the ability to password protect my Notion pages - which isn't a built in capability. Simple Ink gives that functionality and it works - but it does almost nothing else for me.
cons: Their support is absolutely terrible. You submit 3-4 tickets before anyone replies at all and then it's just a basic "we're working on it" - no ETA, no follow up, nothing.

review_title: Why you should switch to Notion Website Builder
description: Love it especially as it's friendly on me financially
author: Sarah O.
pros: Cheaper as compared to the cost of hosting, SSL a website. It also acts as a portfolio
cons: Not extremely easy to use for a beginner

review_title: Great tool, does what it needs to do
description: Overall great. Very good customer support.
author: Tom C.
pros: Unlimited sites is an instant win when comparing to other products. If you have existing content and want to get one or more sites up in a hurry, it's very simple to do.
cons: Lack of delete site function for sites left over from testing on pain accounts. Although contacted support to delete them for me, so not really a problem and something they are going to add I believe.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ease of use is the key
description: Is great and I intentd to use it forever
author: Gerardo R.
pros: The fact that I don't have to use any other software other than Notion is Key for me to update it easily
cons: It doesnt allow to limite the a mount of posts shown

review_title: Fast and Easy Website Builder
description: Overall, it has been a great experience with notion website builder. Whenever I want to share same thing with a lot of people, I just jump directly to notion and create a one page site in minutes and share them. It has made my life a lot easier. Thanks Notion, and I highly recommend Notion Website Builder to others like me.
author: Avash K.
pros: The best thing about Notion Website Builder is its ease. I can easily create a website without any coding knowledge in a matter of minutes. I really like that it allows us to turn notion pages to websites. The best thing is I can dynamically set something to be displayed from other notion pages.
cons: There aren't many things that we can do with Notion Builder when compared to other solutions like WordPress but I think that's what makes it a good product ; especially for notion users. It doesn't have many functionalities but still a very useful product.

review_title: Turn your existing content into a beautiful website without switching platforms!
description: Notion Website Builder has been a very useful tool to help us grow and scale by using the already existing tools and data we have in place... minimizing time lost through duplicate work and education that would be needed to utilize additional tools and platforms.
author: Jonathan W.
pros: If you already use Notion to capture and organize your comtent and information there is no need to port that data into another platform or framework to turn it into a usable, and visually appealing, website.
cons: Due to the limitations of using Notion as the back-end of your site, your options for extensibility and customization are limited.

review_title: Aesthetic and fast website builder!
author: Keyur A.
pros: I really liked the ease of use in setting up my website based on my Notion data. I also loved how real-time editing helped me set up my website in no time. The custom domain feature is a cherry on the top and the pricing is also really affordable. Overall great tool for content creators and others wishing to build their online presence as well as indie hackers looking to build simple projects as a solopreneur!
cons: I wish they had local payment methods integrated so i could pay via UPI! I usually purchase all my subscriptions by subscribing to them on Google Play or via UPI so that was bit of a hassle!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good for Notion Lovers
description: A lot of things are well taken care by Notion Website Builder. The main issue is that we do not use Notion that often. I think Notion Website Builder would be a great investment if we started using Notion more often. A lot can be done by using the custom code feature.
author: Osama K.
pros: The templates and custom domains are easy to use. It's easy add a footer and to customize it with an image. I liked the quick way to add menus. It is simple to add the menu and change the color and styling. The pretty URL is a cool feature to make your website polished. Dark mode works quite well. The speed is excellent.
cons: Some of the templates are expensive. You have to use a public page from Notion. The UI could be more colorful, but it works pretty good nonetheless. Some of the features require an upgrade.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Positive feedback
author: Aditya K.
pros: It’s very user friendly, powerful and intuitive.
cons: Everything is good, I didn’t find any cons.

review_title: Using The Notion Website Builder
description: Worked just as expected, and deliver a stable product.
author: Benjamin N.
pros: It is easy to Connect to my Notion page and is deployed in a few seconds.
cons: You have to add a credit card to deploy a site.

review_title: Great extension for your Notion site
author: Petr N.
pros: Easy to use and I love the option of having custom domain for my Notion pages.
cons: Missing password protection of pages. This feature should be added.

review_title: Simple and easy notion website builder. Recommend!
author: Tanzim R.
pros: I like that it is simple and easy to use. It is intuitive and straightforward. Not loads of bells and whistlers, but excellent for what I wanted; quick and simple launch
cons: Almost too limited in functionality; for instance the site banner up top can't be resized.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A concise overview
description: I would highly recommend it to new people who are looking to get into web development to get a feel of a finished product.
author: Rituraj M.
pros: No coding or maybe some knowledge is required it can be accessible for everyone. Responsiveness takes a huge commitment from coders but it practically solves the problem.
cons: It is not applicable for large scale products for now but i feel it has the potential to make the most impact in terms of flexibility. Customising is kind of overwhelming.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best Website Builder
author: Moses F T.
pros: What I like of Notion Website is the real time editor.
cons: I did see anything in the notion website builder that i don't like.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Simplified Website Building
description: Overall, an efficient, user-friendly solution for building Notion-based websites, making it suitable for individuals and businesses looking for a hassle-free website creation process.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Seamless integration with Notion, I created a website without coding. SEO-optimized, responsive websites with automatic sync to Notion which I felt is awesome. Furthermore, the platform is secure, with SSL certificates generated automatically for websites.
cons: Limited customization options for users seeking highly specialized or unique designs, as the platform's focus is on simplicity and ease of use.

review_title: Simple.ink is a superb way to get a clean and accessible website
description: Really positive, able to put together a clean and accessible website for personal use and host it on a great URL. Plenty of customisation options too.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This was a very clean experience, able to make my portfolio in Notion and to host it on a very clean platform. It looks similar to Notion in general but the hosting process is super smooth, and allows for clean URLs to share too.
cons: Nothing much to say - the free trial gives you what you need to work with. Some features are paywalled but this is fair, and I haven't had any issues since.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Most Enjoyable publisher for Notion sites!!
description: From start (onboarding) to publishing my sites and getting more inspiration on tbe way forward, Simple Ink has been one of my go-to tools for my media agency.
author: Sebastian B.
pros: Simple.ink made it easy for me to publish my Notion webpages and turn them into full websites. The UI is well laid out, and it is a pleasure using Simple Ink.
cons: I have nothing but good things to say! I appreciate the consistent company and feature development.

review_title: Simple and Robust cunstom wesbite builder from Notion.
description: Overall experience is very good. It a simple and very useful tool to publish your website from the Notion with even a custom domain. The search option in the website works perfectly. All these packages make it a very precise and useful Notion website builder.
author: Joysankar M.
pros: 1. The simple and clean user interface 2. Seamless connection with Notion 3. We can add our own custom domain 4. There are so many prebuilt templetes in each category. 5. We can also create forms from Notion. 6. We can set the language of the website aslo.
cons: 1. I do not like the pricing. Pricing should be less. 2. The free version only get access to one page of notion. Sub papages are in pro which is pathetic. 3. It should have more site customization options.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Favour notion
author: Favour A.
pros: Lots of templates makes it easy to edit and build your website
cons: Not so flexible. And visually, it’s not pleasing

review_title: Landed my first freelance project using the website
description: Its been great using simple.ink as it helps me landed my first job as a freelancer
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: You can showcase the project by using templates and deploy it without any code needed.
cons: The custom domain might affect the SEO, but its much useful for portfolio website

review_title: Notion Portfolio Website Review
description: I liked to various techniques I can use or attach to Notion. Didnt know I could create a website on Notion.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Comfortable and ease of use is great. The website design was simple and I also got help from the free resources available.
cons: The layout looks like a notebook so creating a website doesn't match with the notebook background or layout.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Notion a webpage substitute
description: My overall experience has been good, I'd use notion anytime and reference is assured
author: Ryan N.
pros: It's easy to use , user friendly, easy to navigate and edit . Supports team usage and remote control
cons: No control over positioning on tools , it take time to master positioning and alignment

review_title: Excellent way to turn a Notion page into a website
description: Great, would recommend it to others and will continue using it
author: Eowyn L.
pros: It's easy and intuitive to use, it's simple and helps me do exactly what I want it to do. It's inexpensive.
cons: There are certain elements like customizing the header or having subsections in the header that I miss. It's not a huge deal though.
